channels.name: Red/Yellow Dimmer
channels.notes: Controls intensity of Red LEDs, contributing to yellow hues.

channels.name: Green/White Dimmer
channels.notes: Controls intensity of Green LEDs, contributing to white hues.

channels.name: Blue/Pink Dimmer
channels.notes: Controls intensity of Blue LEDs, contributing to pink hues.

channels.name: Strobe
channels.notes: 0-10: No function, 11-255: Strobe slow to fast.

channels.name: Motor
channels.notes: 0-5: No movement, 6-127: Motor static positioning, 128-255: Control motor speed (back and forth movement, slow to fast).

channels.name: Macro
channels.notes: 0-9: CH1-CH6 cannot be used (individual control disabled). 10-39: Macro A1. 40-69: Macro A2. 70-99: Macro A3. 100-129: Macro A4. 130-159: Macro A5. 160-189: Macro A6. 190-219: Macro A7. 220-249: Macro Sound 1. 250-255: Macro Sound 2.
